name: ldr_strategic_goals
description: Long-horizon organizational objectives with owners, timelines, and progress indicators

description.description: Full description of the goal and why it matters to the organization

owner.description: Executive or team responsible for this goal

success_criteria.description: Measurable criteria defining successful achievement of this goal

last_reviewed.description: Date of the last executive review of this goal

name: ldr_okrs
description: Quarterly objectives and key results with progress tracking and status

objective.description: Qualitative objective statement for the quarter

quarter.description: Quarter this OKR belongs to (e.g., Q2 2026)

owner.description: Team or executive who owns this objective

strategic_goal_id.description: Reference to ldr_strategic_goals (parent goal this OKR advances)

key_results.description: Array of {title, target, current, unit, progress_pct} key result objects

overall_progress_pct.description: Aggregate progress across all key results (0-100)

confidence_level.description: Team's confidence level in achieving this OKR by quarter end

blockers.description: Known blockers or risks to achieving this OKR

name: ldr_exec_briefings
description: Consolidated cross-functional briefings with key signals, decisions, and action items for leadership

title.description: Briefing title (e.g., Weekly Executive Summary W19 2026)

period_covered.description: Time period this briefing covers (e.g., 2026-05-06 to 2026-05-12)

prepared_by.description: Person or bot that prepared this briefing

audience.description: List of intended recipients (e.g., CEO, CFO, Board)

key_signals.description: Array of {domain, signal, status} objects representing top signals across functions

action_items.description: Array of {action, owner, due_date} objects requiring leadership decisions or follow-up

summary.description: Executive summary paragraph covering the most important developments

name: ldr_decision_log
description: Records of significant decisions with context, rationale, and outcomes

decision_maker.description: Person or group who made the decision

context.description: Background context that led to this decision

alternatives_considered.description: Other options that were evaluated before reaching this decision

rationale.description: Why this decision was made over the alternatives

expected_outcome.description: Expected result or impact of this decision

review_date.description: Date to review this decision and assess outcomes

strategic_goal_id.description: Reference to ldr_strategic_goals (goal this decision advances)
